title: Mother's Day Plush Teddy Bear – Soft Grey Cuddly Toy Holding Fabric Rose with Gift Tag for Mum, Grandma & Loved Ones
features: ADORABLE MOTHER’S DAY TEDDY – A soft grey plush bear designed to bring love and warmth to any special occasion.
HOLDS A BEAUTIFUL FABRIC ROSE – Features a delicate pink fabric rose, symbolising affection and appreciation.
SUPER SOFT & CUDDLY – Made from 100% polyester, this high-quality plush bear is perfect for hugs and cuddles.
PERFECT GIFT FOR MUM & GRANDMA – A thoughtful present for Mother's Day, birthdays, or to show appreciation any time of the year.
IDEAL KEEPSAKE OR COMPANION – Whether as a sentimental gift or a cosy plush friend, this teddy bear is a lovely gesture of love.
description: Product description Make Mother's Day extra special with this adorable plush teddy bear from Gem Imports. Designed to symbolise love and affection, this super soft grey bear features a sweet embroidered smile and holds a delicate fabric rose, making it a heartfelt gift for mums, grandmas, and loved ones. Made from 100% polyester, this high-quality teddy offers a cuddly and comforting feel, perfect for gifting on Mother’s Day, birthdays, or special occasions. Whether as a sentimental keepsake or a cosy companion, this plush bear is sure to bring a smile to someone special. Safety Warning Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts. Remove all packaging before giving to a child. Keep away from fire.
